---
title: "Embryo projection on Deng data"
author: "Leonard C. Steg"
date: '2025-10-05'
output: html_document
---


```{r}


suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10.knownGene)
  library(org.Mm.eg.db)
  library(tximport)
  library(SummarizedExperiment)
  library(gprofiler2)
  library(edgeR)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(cowplot)
  library(dplyr)
})
```

Load pheno file with metadata and find paths to salmon dirs
```{r}
pheno <- as.data.frame(read_csv("Steg2026/EmbryoRNA/pheno.csv"))

samples <- rownames(pheno)
sample_dirs <- paste0(samples, "_quant")

# Manually map the sample names to the actual directory names with _SX suffix 
salmondir <- "Steg2026/EmbryoRNA/results/01_preprocess/05_salmon_quant/"

files <- file.path(salmondir, sample_dirs, "quant.sf")
names(files) <- samples
```

Load Deng pheno and bind it to sample pheno and find paths to salmon dirs
```{r}
pheno_deng <- as.data.frame(read.csv("Steg2026/Public_data/Deng2014_SRP020490/pheno.csv",row.names = 1))
rownames(pheno_deng) <- pheno_deng$File_name
pheno_deng["dataset"] <- "public"
pheno_deng["Experiment"] <- "Deng_et_al"

# Combine phenos
combined <- bind_rows(pheno, pheno_deng)
head(combined)

# Find paths to salmon dirs
samples_deng <- pheno_deng$File_name
sample_dirs_deng <- paste0(samples_deng, "_quant")
# Quantify reads pre-SNPSplit and pre-dedup
files_deng <- file.path("Steg2026/Public_data/Deng2014_SRP020490/results/01_preprocess/03_salmon_quant", sample_dirs_deng, "quant.sf")
names(files_deng) <- samples_deng

# Combine file paths from embryo and Deng data
files_all <- c(files, files_deng)
```

Load transcript annotation
```{r}
# Read in counts from salmon using tximport
txdb <- TxDb.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10.knownGene
# Extract all the transcript names (TXNAME) as keys
k <- keys(txdb, keytype = "TXNAME")
# Create a mapping (tx2gene) from TXNAME (transcript IDs) to GENEID (UCSC Entrez IDs)
tx2gene <- AnnotationDbi::select(txdb, keys = k, columns = "GENEID", keytype = "TXNAME")
# Use org.Mm.eg.db to map UCSC Entrez IDs to Ensembl Gene IDs
ensembl_map <- mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db, 
                      keys = tx2gene$GENEID, 
                      column = "ENSEMBL", 
                      keytype = "ENTREZID", 
                      multiVals = "first")  # Takes only the first value if multiple mappings exist
# Add the Ensembl gene IDs to the tx2gene data frame
tx2gene$ENSEMBL <- ensembl_map[tx2gene$GENEID]
tx2gene_mapped <- tx2gene[!is.na(tx2gene$GENEID) & !is.na(tx2gene$ENSEMBL), ]
# Convert the ENSEMBL column from a list to a character vector
tx2gene_mapped$ENSEMBL <- sapply(tx2gene_mapped$ENSEMBL, `[`, 1)
```


Use tx import to import salmon and quantify on gene level
```{r}
# Use tximport and extract counts
txi <- tximport(files_all, type = "salmon", tx2gene = tx2gene_mapped[, c("TXNAME", "ENSEMBL")])
counts <- txi$counts

se.projection <- SummarizedExperiment(assays = list(counts = as.matrix(counts)),
                           colData = DataFrame(combined))
rowData(se.projection) <- gconvert(query = gsub("\\..*","", rownames(se.projection)), 
                                   organism = "mmusculus", target = "ENSG", filter_na = FALSE)

# Filter and normalize
geneExpr.projection <- DGEList(assays(se.projection)$counts)
geneExpr.projection <- calcNormFactors(geneExpr.projection, method = "TMM")

transcripts <- filterByExpr(counts <- geneExpr.projection$counts)
se.projection <- se.projection[transcripts, ]
geneExpr.projection <- geneExpr.projection[transcripts, ]
ntranscripts <- sum(transcripts)

assays(se.projection)$logcpm <- log1p(cpm(geneExpr.projection))
```

```{r}
stage_order <- c(
  "early2cell", "mid2cell", "late2cell", "C57twocell", "2cell_tbd",
  "4cell", "8cell", "16cell",
  "earlyblast", "midblast", "lateblast",
  "zy1", "zy2", "zy3", "zy4",
  "fibroblast", "BXC"
)

se.projection$Stage[1:87] <- "2cell_tbd"

colData(se.projection)$Stage <- factor(colData(se.projection)$Stage, levels = stage_order)

stage <- se.projection$Stage   # same as colData(se)$Experiment

se.fibroblast <- se.projection[, stage == "fibroblast"]
se.early2cell   <- se.projection[, stage == "early2cell"]
se.mid2cell   <- se.projection[, stage == "mid2cell"]
se.late2cell   <- se.projection[, stage == "late2cell"]
se.C57twocell   <- se.projection[, stage == "C57twocell"]
se.2cell_tbd   <- se.projection[, stage == "2cell_tbd"]
se.4cell   <- se.projection[, stage == "4cell"]
se.8cell   <- se.projection[, stage == "8cell"]
se.16cell   <- se.projection[, stage == "16cell"]
se.earlyblast   <- se.projection[, stage == "earlyblast"]
se.midblast   <- se.projection[, stage == "midblast"]
se.lateblast   <- se.projection[, stage == "lateblast"]
se.BXC <- se.projection[, stage == "BXC"]
```

Plotting function
```{r}
plot_pca <- function(se, assay_name, color_by,
                     shape_by    = NULL,
                     add_labels  = FALSE,
                     title       = NULL,
                     color_label = NULL,
                     shape_label = NULL) {
  
  # If no pretty label is given, use the column name
  if (is.null(color_label)) color_label <- color_by
  if (is.null(shape_label)) shape_label <- shape_by
  
  # Extract matrix and run PCA
  mat <- assays(se)[[assay_name]]
  pca <- prcomp(t(mat))
  pc  <- as.data.frame(pca$x)
  
  # Variance explained (same style as your code)
  varexplained <- paste(
    round(summary(pca)$importance[2,] * 100, digits = 2),
    "%"
  )
  
  # Put metadata in columns of pc so ggplot sees them normally
  pc[[color_by]] <- colData(se)[[color_by]]
  if (!is.null(shape_by)) {
    pc[[shape_by]] <- colData(se)[[shape_by]]
  }
  
  # Base ggplot
  if (is.null(shape_by)) {
    p <- ggplot(pc, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2,
                        col = .data[[color_by]])) +
      geom_point(size = 1) +
      labs(colour = color_label)
  } else {
    p <- ggplot(pc, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2,
                        col   = .data[[color_by]],
                        shape = .data[[shape_by]])) +
      geom_point(size = 1) +
      labs(colour = color_label, shape = shape_label)
  }
  
  # Optional labels
  if (add_labels) {
    p <- p +
      ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
        aes(label = rownames(pc)),
        box.padding   = 0.35,
        point.padding = 0.5,
        segment.color = "grey50",
        max.overlaps  = 5,
        size          = 4.5
      )
  }
  
  # manual colors only when coloring by Stage
  if (color_by == "Stage") {
    stage_cols <- c(
      early2cell = "#1b9e77",
      mid2cell   = "#d95f02",
      late2cell  = "#7570b3",
      C57twocell = "#e7298a",
      `2cell_tbd` = "red",
      `4cell`    = "#66a61e",
      `8cell`    = "#e6ab02",
      `16cell`   = "#a6761d",
      earlyblast = "#1f78b4",
      midblast   = "#b2df8a",
      lateblast  = "#fb9a99",
      zy1        = "#cab2d6",
      zy2        = "#fdbf6f",
      zy3        = "#ff7f00",
      zy4        = "#6a3d9a",
      fibroblast = "black",
      BXC        = "grey50"
    )
    
    p <- p + scale_colour_manual(values = stage_cols, drop = FALSE)
  }
  
  p +
    xlab(paste("PC1", varexplained[1])) +
    ylab(paste("PC2", varexplained[2])) +
    ggtitle(title) +
    theme_cowplot(10)
}
```

Plot and save
```{r}
# Remove samples with non-relevant stages
stage.to.remove <- c("C57twocell","BXC", "fibroblast")
se.projection.sub <- se.projection[,!(se.projection$Stage %in% stage.to.remove)]

# Run plotting function
pca_projection <- plot_pca(
    se         = se.projection.sub,
    assay_name = "logcpm",
    color_by   = "Stage",
    color_label = NULL,
    shape_by   = NULL,
    add_labels = FALSE, 
    title      = "Logcpm - not deduplicated - removed BXC and fibroblasts"
  )

ggsave("PCA_projection.pdf", plot = pca_projection, path = "Steg2026/EmbryoRNA/results/02_qc_plots/16_staging_QC/", 
       width = 10, height = 6, units = "cm")
```
